series_metadata.series_title: State of Ohio Front Web Pages
series_metadata.series_description: Front pages from the State of Ohio website created by the DAS Office of Information Systems Policy & Planning (OPP). May include Governor & Lt. Governor pages created by OPP and supporting documentation such as web page best practices, site statistics etc.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Appraise by State Archives historical value when pages undergo substantial changes
